description_long: This is a single, low-cut casual shoe with a rounded toe and a smooth, matte finish. The upper appears to be made of synthetic leather or coated fabric, with visible stitching along the sides and toe box for reinforcement. The shoe features a standard criss-cross lacing system with round laces, and the collar is padded for comfort. The outsole is slightly textured, likely made of rubber, and extends up around the heel and toe for added durability. The interior is lined with a softer material, possibly fabric or foam, for cushioning. The overall color is a dark, muted gray, giving it a versatile and understated appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A dark gray, low-cut casual shoe with a smooth finish, padded collar, and standard lacing. The shoe has a slightly textured rubber sole and reinforced stitching.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth upper, visible stitching, and the full length of the laces and padded collar.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded heel collar and the back seam, with laces visible above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shoe's profile, stitching, and the curvature of the sole.
description_view_3: Front view showing the rounded toe, lacing system, and the width of the shoe's opening.
